_comment: Single source of truth for Switchy tracked-link constants. switchy-engine and any caller (farming-postcard, newsletter-generator, etc.) read this. NEVER put the API token here — token lives in env SWITCHY_API_TOKEN or ~/.switchy/token.
tiktok_note: No native Switchy TikTok pixel — route via gtm or accept click-only.
exclusion_audience_note: Maintain a standing Meta custom audience of agents/vendors/team emails; exclude from every campaign.
